title: India’s Clean Energy Push Aims at Self-Reliance and Global Leadership: Dr. Jitendra Singh

title: How Vyana Is Bridging Physiotherapy and Artificial Intelligence for Better Recovery
description: Vyana Care blends AI with physiotherapy to deliver continuous, personalized care, improving recovery outcomes beyond traditional clinic-based treatment.

title: AI-powered 'lab-on-a-chip' platform may enable same-day treatment decisions for pediatric patients
description: Scientists at the University of Utah (the U) have developed a new "lab-on-a-chip" device that uses artificial intelligence to rapidly predict cancer cell sensitivity to targeted therapies for children with T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (T-ALL), an aggressive and difficult-to-treat cancer.

title: Multibillion-dollar Nvidia deal brings quiet Saxonburg-based manufacturer Coherent into the spotlight
description: Coherent executive Steve Rummel offered a peek under the hood Friday at the Saxonburg-based manufacturer’s multibillion-dollar deal with Nvidia, a stock market darling and driving force behind much of the artificial intelligence industry. title: Meta boosts Texas AI data center investment to $10 billion
description: META said on Thursday it is increasing investment in its El Paso, Texas, artificial intelligence (AI) data center to $10 billion, a more than sixfold jump, as it aims to hit 1-gigawatt capacity ahead of the facility’s projected opening in 2028.

title: Apple plans to open Siri to rival AI services
description: APPLE plans to open its Siri voice assistant to rival artificial intelligence (AI) services beyond its current partnership with ChatGPT, Bloomberg News reported on Thursday, citing people familiar with the matter.

title: OpenAI's US ad pilot exceeds $100 million in annualized revenue in 6 weeks
description: OPENAI’S ChatGPT ads pilot in the United States has crossed the $100-million annualized revenue mark within six weeks of launch, a company spokesman said on Thursday, pointing to robust early demand for the artificial intelligence (AI) startup’s nascent advertising business.

title: 'No idea what my kids' career will be in 15 years': Ex-Meta PM shares 4 things that will matter more than degrees in the AI era
description: As artificial intelligence reshapes careers, parents face uncertainty. Xiaoyin Qu, a former Meta product manager, suggests focusing on financial security for children. She emphasizes imagination and resilience as crucial for adapting to evolving job markets. Human connection and emotional intelligence will also be highly valued. These qualities offer stability in an unpredictable future driven by AI.
